fields.name: services
fields.label: Services
fields.description: Limit collection to the Okta service areas the current script actually evaluates.

fields.name: includeDeactivated
fields.label: Include deactivated users
fields.description: Pass through the CLI flag to include deactivated users in the scan.

fields.name: inactiveThresholdDays
fields.label: Inactive Threshold (Days)
fields.description: Flag users inactive beyond this many days.

output.label: Output Mode
output.description: Choose how Okta collection results should be emitted: summary text, JSON, or no stdout output.
